def eligible_for_unemployment_benefits(self) -> bool:
        valid_genders = ['transgender', 'non-binary', 'male', 'female', 'gender neutral']
        valid_ages = [28, 30, 31, 44, 45, 46, 59, 60, 61]
        valid_races = ['asian', 'white', 'black', 'hispanic', 'indian']
        valid_employment_statuses = ['employed', 'retired', 'unemployed', 'student']
        valid_educations = ['high school', 'college', 'bachelor', 'master', 'doctor']
        valid_marital_statuses = ['single', 'married', 'widowed', 'divorced', 'legally separated']
        valid_religions = ['christianity', 'islam', 'atheist', 'hinduism', 'buddhism']

        if (self.gender.lower() not in valid_genders
                or self.age not in valid_ages
                or self.race not in valid_races
                or self.employment_status not in valid_employment_statuses
                or self.education not in valid_educations
                or self.marital_status not in valid_marital_statuses
                or self.religion not in valid_religions
                or self.previous_salary not in range(25000, 45001)
                or self.duration_of_unemployment not in range(1, 13)):
            return False
        return True
